title: IndexStatusInspectionResult
description: Index status inspection results for a URL.

verdict.description: The overall verdict for the index status of the URL.

coverageState.description: The coverage state of the URL, indicating whether and how it appears in the index. Common values include Submitted and indexed, Crawled - currently not indexed, Discovered - currently not indexed, and URL is unknown to Google.

robotsTxtState.description: Whether the page is blocked by robots.txt.

indexingState.description: Whether the page is blocked from indexing via noindex directives.

lastCrawlTime.description: The last time this URL was crawled by Google, in RFC 3339 format.

pageFetchState.description: The result of the page fetch during the last crawl.

googleCanonical.description: The URL that Google selected as canonical for this page.

userCanonical.description: The canonical URL declared by the page via rel=canonical or the Canonical HTTP header.

sitemap.description: Any sitemaps that include this URL.

referringUrls.description: URLs that refer to this URL, as discovered during crawling.

crawledAs.description: The user agent type used to crawl the URL.
